data.title: Block to Join S&P 500 Index
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Jack Dorsey's payment company, Block (stock symbol: XYZ), is set to be included in the S&P 500 Index.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald's SPAC Unit Files for Fifth IPO
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Cantor Equity Partners IV, a SPAC entity led by Brandon Lutnick, son of U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, has filed for an initial public offering. This marks the fifth SPAC project for the Wall Street investment bank Cantor Fitzgerald. The entity has previously secured two agreements related to Bitcoin asset reserves.

data.title: Elon Musk's Hitchhiker's Galaxy Meets Buc-ee's Drive-In Restaurant Nears Completion: Will Tesla Accept Dogecoin?
data.description:

data.title: Russia eyes two islands for testing crypto settlements
data.description:
Russia should allow companies registered on two islands at both ends of the vast country to conduct settlements in cryptocurrencies, a Russian senator has suggested. The destinations are designated as special administrative regions, and the digital transactions there won’t clash with the central bank’s stance that crypto payments must be kept outside the nation’s main […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-eyes-two-islands-for-testing-crypto-settlements/

data.title: Donald Trump Signs GENIUS Act Into Law: “They Named It After Me”
data.description:
GENIUS Act has been signed into law by President Trump on Friday afternoon at the White House, establishing federal stablecoin regulations. The Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U. S. Stablecoins Act passed the House in a 308-122 vote during Republican "Crypto Week.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/donald-trump-signs-genius-act-into-law-they-named-it-after-me/

data.title: Trump to impose 20% tariff on all European goods
data.description:
Donald Trump has decided to jack up tariffs on every single good coming from Europe, pushing for a baseline rate of 15% to 20% in the next trade deal, according to the Financial Times. This comes after multiple rounds of back-and-forth talks with Brussels that aimed to hold tariffs at 10%, but that idea’s been […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-to-impose-20-tariff-on-all-eu-goods/

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation Roundup: Trump Signs GENIUS Act and SEC Eyes Tokenization Tweaks
data.description:
GENIUS Act has been signed into law by President Trump following House passage after initial failure. The legislation establishes federal oversight for stablecoins with 1:1 reserve backing requirements, introduces licensing pathways for issuers, and places oversight with prudential regulators.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/genius-act-weekly-crypto-regulation-trump-signs-sec-tokenization/

data.title: Bitcoin Dominance Sinks as Ethereum, XRP Rise
data.description:
The original digital asset accounted for 61% of the cryptocurrency market’s value on Friday, falling from 65. 5% last week.
source: https://decrypt.co/330896/bitcoin-dominance-sinks-as-ethereum-xrp-rise

data.title: President Trump Says Crypto is Good for the Dollar, Claiming Genius Act Will Ensure America’s Dominance
data.description:
President Trump expresses his belief that cryptocurrency has the potential to be beneficial for the value and stability of the U.S. dollar. He asserts that the implementation of his proposed Genius Act will play a crucial role in securing and maintaining America's financial dominance in the global economy, fostering innovation and competitiveness in the cryptocurrency sector while ultimately strengthening the nation’s currency.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-says-crypto-is-good-for-the-dollar-claiming-genius-act-will-ensure-americas-dominance/

data.title: President Trump Says Crypto is Good for the Dollar, Claiming Genius Act Will Ensure America’s Dominance
data.description:
President Trump has expressed his belief that cryptocurrency is beneficial for the U.S. dollar, asserting that his upcoming legislative proposal, referred to as the Genius Act, will play a crucial role in maintaining and strengthening America's dominance in the global financial landscape. He argues that embracing digital currencies can enhance economic growth and innovation, pushing the boundaries of the traditional financial system while ensuring that the United States remains a leader in the digital economy.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-says-crypto-good-for-the-dollar-claiming-genius-act-will-ensure-americas-dominance/

data.title: XRP Open Interest Just Hit A Fresh ATH Above $10 Billion, Will Price Follow Next?
data.description:
XRP Open Interest (OI) has surged to a new all-time high, surpassing $10 billion across major crypto exchanges. This jump in futures activity comes as the XRP price climbs toward $3. 48, its highest level in years. Historically, rising Open Interest has often coincided with significant price rallies, suggesting the potential for further upside in XRP’s trajectory
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-open-interest-at-ath/

data.title: President Trump Officially Signs Genius Act Into Law: Here is Why This is Game Changing
data.description:
President Trump has officially signed the Genius Act into law, a landmark piece of legislation that is poised to bring about significant changes in various sectors. This groundbreaking act aims to foster innovation and creativity across the nation, promoting advancements in technology, education, and research. Here are the key reasons why the Genius Act is considered a game-changing development that could transform the landscape of American innovation and provide numerous opportunities for individuals and businesses alike.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-officially-signs-genius-act-into-law-here-is-why-this-is-game-changing/
